step3_h1_synthetic_refresh.notes: Strong quality lift vs baseline; false-refusal still slightly high

step4_h2_soften_refusal.what_changed: Broad post-gen refusal soften to clarify

step4b_h2_grounded_rescue.notes: Recovered from step4 regression; similar to v1

step6_h4_symbol_retrieval.what_changed: Retrieval rerank for explicit dotted symbols
step6_h4_symbol_retrieval.notes: Champion at v5: manual quality improved and false-refusal dropped to 0.0303

step7_h5_citation_retry.notes: No material improvement vs champion; not retained

step8_hybrid_rrf.notes: Rejected: RRF score scale mismatched confidence thresholds, causing near-universal refusals

step8b_hybrid_rrf_calibrated.what_changed: Hybrid retrieval (RRF ranking + dense-scale confidence score)
step8b_hybrid_rrf_calibrated.notes: Validated fix and safety recovery to parity with champion; no net uplift vs best run, so not promoted

step10_reranker_cross_encoder.notes: Champion moved v5 -> v9: always-on reranking raised manual and holdout while maintaining safety pass

step10_reranker_cross_encoder_r1.what_changed: Conditional cross-encoder reranking enabled (low_margin_only, threshold 0.05); rerank applies only on low-confidence retrieval margins
step10_reranker_cross_encoder_r1.notes: Validation run to compare selective reranking against always-on reranker baseline

step10_conditional_t015.what_changed: Conditional cross-encoder reranking threshold sweep candidate (low_margin_only, threshold 0.15)
step10_conditional_t015.notes: Champion moved v9 -> v11: threshold 0.15 preserved quality and improved latency

step11_eval_hardening.what_changed: Lock-in confirmation run for conditional reranking champion (low_margin_only, threshold 0.15)
step11_eval_hardening.notes: Final full-pass confirmation run before freezing this cycle

step11_eval_hardening_metrics.what_changed: Eval hardening: added heuristic faithfulness and answer-relevancy metrics (evaluation-only)
step11_eval_hardening_metrics.notes: Guardrails unchanged; side-by-side validation confirms core safety/accuracy parity while exposing new hardening signals
